ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_evaluations" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance evaluation record */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation type */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age group */,
  "gen_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gender group */,
  "person_count_at_risk" INTEGER /* Count of individuals at risk within the group */,
  "person_count_with_outcome" INTEGER /* Count of individuals with the specified outcome */,
  "average_predicted_probability" REAL /* Average predicted probability of the outcome */,
  "st_dev_predicted_probability" REAL /* Standard deviation of the predicted probability */,
  "min_predicted_probability" REAL /* Minimum predicted probability observed */,
  "p_25_predicted_probability" REAL /* 25th percentile of predicted probabilities */,
  "p_50_predicted_probability" REAL /* 50th percentile of predicted probabilities */,
  "p_75_predicted_probability" REAL /* 75th percentile of predicted probabilities */,
  "max_predicted_probability" REAL /* Maximum predicted probability observed */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was conducted */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the evaluation was performed */,
  "intervention_type" TEXT /* Type of health intervention being evaluated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the evaluation */,
  "risk_factor_ids" TEXT /* List of risk factors considered in the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_evaluations_gen_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("gen_group_id") REFERENCES gender_groups ("gen_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_evaluations_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_evaluations_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation type */,
  "evaluation_name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluation type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the evaluation type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the evaluation type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation type was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the evaluation type */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation type was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  "start_age" INTEGER /* Start age of the age group */,
  "end_age" INTEGER /* End age of the age group */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the age group */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the age group was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the age group */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the age group was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gender_groups" (
  "gen_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender group */,
  "gender_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gender group */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the gender group */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the gender group was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the gender group */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the gender group was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gen_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_factors" (
  "risk_factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk factor */,
  "risk_factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the risk factor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the risk factor */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the risk factor */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the risk factor was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the risk factor */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the risk factor was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "outcome_name" TEXT /* Name of the outcome */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the outcome */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the outcome */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the outcome was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the outcome */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the outcome was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction record */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance evaluation this prediction is derived from */,
  "average_probability" REAL /* Average probability of the predicted outcome */,
  "confidence_interval_low" REAL /* Low bound of the confidence interval */,
  "confidence_interval_high" REAL /* High bound of the confidence interval */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the statistical model used for the prediction */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES performance_evaluations ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the platform (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the performance evaluation */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance evaluation being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the user's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES performance_evaluations ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the report (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the generated report file */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of users or roles the report is shared with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
